title: Monday/Integromat(MAKE) Specialist Required (Qld, Australia Location)

posts.author: BillyBlake (Billy Blake)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi MC,

We’re an engineering consultancy firm who use monday quite religiously for our day to day operations of projects.

We’re looking for a local consultant to South-east Queensland, Australia (Brisbane or Sunshine Coast based would be amazing).

We’ve had a consultant from Canada help us to date and they’ve been nothing short of amazing; however, the time zones are really delaying our efforts.

We need someone capable with the following platforms?:
-Monday.com
-Integromat/Make
-Xero
-App integration in general
-Workflow with the above and the below in mind:
–outlook
–sharepoint
–microsoft word/excel

Please reach out so we can organise a time to catch up and discuss further.
Thanks, Billy

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BillyBlake

Welcome to the monday.com community!

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Canberra, Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. We have plenty of experience in connective solutions as well as integration requirements so I’m confident we can help.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BillyBlake

My name is Elena and i’m the founder of Kick Consulting. We’ve specialised in monday for over 5 years and are an Australia monday.com partners from the East Coast. We have project managers located in NSW, Brissy and NZ.

We have extensive experience in all the application you’ve mentioned and would love to meet to see if we can help. You can book a complimentary meeting through this link.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

We’re one of the trusted monday.com consulting partners having dedicated monday dot com experts, who assist without time zone interruptions. No matter the time zone or how complex the business process is, our remote monday com experts can ensure 100% uptime of automated workflows, integrations, and bots for your business.

The experts can also help break information silos by enabling app integrations, CRM integrations, communication tools, Email, cloud storage integration, etc. This allows you to sync data, push and pull reports, and connect all apps your workforce needs. Through strategic integrations, the experts can help your business streamline processes, ensure real-time reporting, and boost efficiency.
